title: Tender Tangy Monsoon Venezuelan Fideo Pilaf
description: A unique Venezuelan-inspired dish featuring tender fideo pasta, tangy flavors and wok-hei5 charm, all in one pan and ready in under 30 minutes. Inspired by the monsoon flavors of Venezuela, this easy pescatarian-friendly recipe will transport you to the vibrant markets of Caracas.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the diced onion until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomato, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the fideo pasta, fish broth, cumin, and saffron threads. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 8-10 minutes or until the fideo is tender.
Stir in the freshly squeezed lime juice.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
